name: HXT_TM_HEADER
description: This table represents the timecard header available in the Webentry Timecard UI. It will hold all the header level information for the timecard like Timecard Header Comments,User Status, Resource Id, Resrouce Type, etc apart from holding the timecard header level attributes if configured with any.

columns.Name: TM_HEADER_ID
columns.Comments: This will be the timecard id for the timecards stored in the UI table.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: ENTERPRISE_ID

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: RESOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: FK to PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F. The Id of the resource for whom the timecard has been entered.

columns.Name: TCLAYST_ID
columns.Comments: FK to HXT_TCLAYST_B. The Id of the layout set which was used to create the timecard.

columns.Name: RESOURCE_TYPE
columns.Comments: Type of the Resource for whom the timecard has been entered.

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: Denotes the Start Date of the timecard.

columns.Name: END_DATE
columns.Comments: Denotes the End Date of the timecard.

columns.Name: OBJECT_TYPE
columns.Comments: If the data is for Timecard or Template.

columns.Name: TIME_REPORTER_ID
columns.Comments: Denotes who actually reported this timecard. FK to PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.

columns.Name: TIME_BLDG_BLK_ID
columns.Comments: The timecard id link between the UI table and the time store table. Foriegn key to the HXT_TM_BLDG_BLKS Table.For template this will be null.

columns.Name: TIME_BLDG_BLK_VERSION
columns.Comments: The Time Building Block version link between the UI table and the time store table.Foriegn key to the HXT_TM_BLDG_BLKS Table.For template this will be null.

columns.Name: LAST_COMMIT_TIME
columns.Comments: LAST_COMMIT_TIME

columns.Name: CALCULATED_TIME_HEADER_ID
columns.Comments: CALCULATED_TIME_HEADER_ID

columns.Name: DATA_SET_ID
columns.Comments: FK to HXT_DATA_SETS.DATA_SET_ID. Used in the R12 Archiving solution.

columns.Name: COMMENTS
columns.Comments: Timecard level comments.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
